title: Velvety Spicy Egyptian Milk Stew
description:
A rich, creamy, and spicy milk stew originating from Egypt, perfect for a cozy night in.
This dish is vegan-friendly and can be served as a comforting dinner for any meal occasion.
instructions: Heat the oil in a hot pot vessel over medium heat.
Add the onion, carrots, and potatoes. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are lightly browned, about 10 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Pour in the semi-skimmed milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let it cook for 20 minutes, or until the milk has thickened and the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the spice blend and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
